name: Mutual Aid Pool Agent
description: AI agent that manages a community emergency fund. Evaluates claims, routes payments via Safe multisig, and coordinates group chat deliberation for mutual aid decisions. Deployed across 4 chains with gasless L2 support.

supportedTools.name: submit_claim
supportedTools.description: Submit an emergency claim to the mutual aid pool with evidence IPFS hash

supportedTools.name: evaluate_claim
supportedTools.description: Evaluate a claim and recommend approve/reject based on evidence review

supportedTools.name: vouch_for_member
supportedTools.description: Vouch for a new member to join the mutual aid pool

supportedTools.name: open_contribution_stream
supportedTools.description: Open a Superfluid USDCx stream to the pool as monthly contribution

supportedTools.name: sync_member_streams
supportedTools.description: Sync all member contribution streams and update membership status

supportedTools.name: resolve_ens
supportedTools.description: Resolve an ENS name to an Ethereum address (forward resolution) or get ENS name from address (reverse resolution)

supportedTools.name: resolve_ens_contact
supportedTools.description: Look up ENS text records (email, GitHub, Twitter, Telegram, url, description) for an ENS name — enables ENS-based communication

supportedTools.name: send_x402_payment
supportedTools.description: Send an x402 micro-payment to another agent for evaluation work

supportedTools.name: swap_usdc
supportedTools.description: Swap USDC for another token via Uniswap V3

supportedTools.name: quote_swap
supportedTools.description: Get a Uniswap V3 quote for a swap

supportedTools.name: register_erc8004
supportedTools.description: Register an agent identity on ERC-8004

supportedTools.name: register_status_agent
supportedTools.description: Register agent on Status Network Sepolia via StatusAgent contract

supportedTools.name: lido_stake
supportedTools.description: Stake ETH to receive stETH via Lido MCP

supportedTools.name: lido_wrap
supportedTools.description: Wrap stETH into wstETH on Base Sepolia

supportedTools.name: vault_position
supportedTools.description: Monitor Lido Earn vault positions on Base Sepolia

supportedTools.name: vault_alert
supportedTools.description: Set yield floor alert for vault position with Telegram/email

supportedTools.name: genlayer_evaluate_claim
supportedTools.description: Evaluate a mutual aid claim using GenLayer's LLM-powered intelligent contract. Stars (1-5) assigned based on claim reasonableness, evidence quality, and community impact. Non-deterministic — resolved via GenLayer Optimistic Democracy consensus.

supportedTools.name: genlayer_get_average_stars
supportedTools.description: Get the average evaluation stars for a claim from the GenLayer ClaimEvaluator contract

supportedTools.name: genlayer_submit_evaluation
supportedTools.description: Submit an evaluation to the GenLayer ClaimEvaluator contract on-chain
